changelog:
- Fix: OTA updates now install correctly — file is downloaded to internal cache, FileProvider path matches both cache and external-cache
- Fix: Clearer toast message when install permission needs to be enabled first
- Scan sound effect on successful scan
- Animated gradient text on splash (matching web)
- Inter & JetBrains Mono fonts throughout
- Gradient buttons (cyan→purple) matching web
- Pill-shaped status badges
- Updated glass UI panels
- Stat cards with accent bar
- Firebase RTDB permissions fixed
- Subjects/settings save reliability improved
